Menus.EndString: Are you sure you're ready to quit?. Press Y to Quit.
What? Quitting already? Press Y to Quit.
Are a few hungry animals too tough for you? Press Y to Quit.
Giving up so soon? Press Y to Quit.
Be sure to take your umbrella, it's wet out there. Press Y to Quit.
You're going to let those animals run free? Press Y to Quit.
Did the animals wear you out? Press Y to Quit.
Are you monkeying around or do you really want to quit? Press Y to Quit.
The animals might get hungry if you're gone too long! Press Y to Quit.
For Evolution, press Y. For more Intelligent Design, press N.
Press N to feed more hungry animals. Press Y to let them STARVE!
Press N to calm down more goats or Y to let them eat your sandals.
Menus.MenuFunction: if IsSecretLevel() then ContinueToNextLevel() elseif GetEpisode() == 1 and GetFloor() == 3 then NavigateToMenu("Mission2") elseif GetEpisode() == 2 and GetFloor() == 4 then NavigateToMenu("Mission3") elseif GetEpisode() == 3 and GetFloor() == 5 then NavigateToMenu("Mission4") elseif GetEpisode() == 4 and GetFloor() == 5 then NavigateToMenu("Mission5") elseif GetEpisode() == 5 and GetFloor() == 6 then NavigateToMenu("Mission6") else ContinueToNextLevel() end

Menu.Name: Mission1
Menu.Text:
You'll be out of the ark in six days, Noah. Unfortunately, the animals are a tad bit restless and want to get out now. Good thing you brought all that food with you. You'll need it to put the busy ones to sleep.
At the end of the first day, be prepared to deal with Carl the Camel. He's been real cranky lately and is a bit out of control.
Good luck and be careful...
Menu.Pause: if GetFloor() > 0 then ContinueToNextLevel() else SetStartGame(true) end

Menu.Name: Mission2
Menu.Text:
Wow, Noah! Carl sure was hard to calm down. But remember, you were chosen to guide this ark to safety because you know how to get the job done.
The closing of day two ends with irritable Ginny the Giraffe. She may be tall and quick, but give her enough food and it's off to sleep.
Oh, and Noah, remember to keep an eye out for hidden rooms...
Menu.Pause: if GetFloor() > 0 then ContinueToNextLevel() else SetStartGame(true) end

Menu.Name: Mission3
Menu.Text:
ZZZZZ... Great job, Noah!. Ginny is snoring away.
Boy, it seems the animals never seem to stay asleep very long.
Keep your eye out for Melvin the Monkey. He can be pretty tricky and may try distracting you with coconuts, but it's your job to get him settled down for the rest of your time aboard the ark.
Menu.Pause: if GetFloor() > 0 then ContinueToNextLevel() else SetStartGame(true) end

Menu.Name: Mission4
Menu.Text:
You're doing a great job, Noah! You took care of that Melvin like a real pro.
I hope you haven't worn yourself out yet, because more challenges are ahead.
Kerry the Kangaroo awaits you, and she doesn't look the least bit tired. Are you ready for her? She needs to rest like the other animals.
Menu.Pause: if GetFloor() > 0 then ContinueToNextLevel() else SetStartGame(true) end

Menu.Name: Mission5
Menu.Text:
Wow! Kerry was no challenge for you! Can you keep up the pace when faced with Ernie the Elephant?
Don't worry. Very soon you will be on dry land, and you won't have to chase the animals around the ark anymore.
Menu.Pause: if GetFloor() > 0 then ContinueToNextLevel() else SetStartGame(true) end

Menu.Name: Mission6
Menu.Text:
You are almost there! If you can get through one more day, you will be out of here for good!
Rumor has it one of the bears does not want to be found. In fact he may try to hide from you. Be on the alert for Burt the Bear.
Get him to sleep and your work is done!
Menu.Pause: if GetFloor() > 0 then ContinueToNextLevel() else SetStartGame(true) end

Menu.Name: Main
Menu.OnCancel: if IsGameInProgress() then ResumeGame() else RequestQuit() end

MenuItem.Text: Carl the Camel Start at level 1-1
Ginny the Giraffe Start at level 2-1
Melvin the Monkey Start at level 3-1
Kerry the Kangaroo Start at level 4-1
Ernie the Elephant Start at level 5-1
Burt the Bear Start at level 6-1

Menu.Name: NewGame
Menu.OnSelectionChanged: -- Update the difficulty face picture based on current selection local index = GetSelectedIndex() if index == 0 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_BABYMODEPIC') elseif index == 1 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_EASYPIC') elseif index == 2 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_NORMALPIC') elseif index == 3 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_HARDPIC') end

Menu.Name: Sound
Menu.OnSelectionChanged:
-- Update all toggle switches to reflect current sound settings local soundMode = GetSoundMode() local digiMode = GetDigiMode() local musicEnabled = GetMusicEnabled()
-- Sound Effects toggles if soundMode == "Off" then SetPicture('SoundFxNone', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxPC', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxAdLib', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') elseif soundMode == "PC" then SetPicture('SoundFxNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxPC', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxAdLib', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') elseif soundMode == "AdLib" then SetPicture('SoundFxNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxPC', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxAdLib', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') end
-- Digitized Sound toggles if digiMode == "Off" then SetPicture('DigiNone', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('DigiSoundBlaster', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') elseif digiMode == "SoundBlaster" then SetPicture('DigiNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('DigiSoundBlaster', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') end
-- Music toggles if not musicEnabled then SetPicture('MusicNone', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('MusicAdLib', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') else SetPicture('MusicNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('MusicAdLib', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') end

Menu.Name: LoadGame
Menu.OnShow: for i = 0, 9 do local name = GetSaveSlotName(i) if name == "" then SetItemText(i, "- empty -") else SetItemText(i, name) end end

Menu.Name: SaveGame
Menu.OnShow: for i = 0, 9 do local name = GetSaveSlotName(i) if name == "" then SetItemText(i, "- empty -") else SetItemText(i, name) end end

Menu.Name: ViewScores
Menu.OnShow: for i = 0, GetHighScoreCount() - 1 do SetText("Name" .. i, GetHighScoreName(i)) SetText("Level" .. i, GetHighScoreDisplayLevel(i)) SetText("Score" .. i, tostring(GetHighScoreScore(i))) end

Menu.Name: Quiz
Menu.OnShow:
if not HasPendingQuiz() then ResumeGame() else SetText("QuizHeader", "Question #" .. tostring(GetQuizQuestionIndex() + 1)) if ShouldShowQuizReference() then SetText("QuizBody", GetQuizQuestionText() .. "\n(" .. GetQuizReference() .. ")") else SetText("QuizBody", GetQuizQuestionText()) end
for i = 0, 3 do local visible = i < GetQuizAnswerCount() SetItemVisible(i, visible) if visible then SetItemText(i, tostring(i + 1) .. ". " .. GetQuizAnswerText(i)) end end end

Menu.Name: QuizResultCorrect
Menu.OnShow: AddValue("Score", 1000) if GetValue("Health") < 100 then AddValue("Health", 25) AddValue("Feed", 10) else AddValue("Feed", 25) end SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 4) SetPicture("Face", "GOTGATLINGPIC") PlaySound("PERCENT100SND")

Menu.Name: QuizResultIncorrect
Menu.OnShow: AddValue("Health", 4) local health = GetValue("Health") if health <= 0 then SetPicture("Face", "FACE8APIC") else local level = math.min(7, math.floor((100 - health) / 16) + 1) SetPicture("Face", "FACE" .. level .. "APIC") end PlaySound("NOBONUSSND")

Menu.Name: LevelComplete
Menu.OnShow:
local floor = GetFloor() local secretLevel = IsSecretLevel() local secretBonus = secretLevel and 15000 or 0 if IsSecretLevel() then SetPicture("TitleTop", "W_SECRETPIC") SetPicture("TitleMiddle", "W_LEVELPIC") SetText("EpisodeNumber", "") else SetPicture("TitleTop", "W_LEVELPIC") SetPicture("TitleMiddle", "W_FLOORPIC") SetText("EpisodeNumber", tostring(GetEpisode())) end SetText("FloorNumber", tostring(floor)) SetText("ParValue", FormatTime(GetParTime())) SetText("TimeValue", FormatTime(GetLevelTime()))
-- Calculate ratios local kr = GetKillTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetKillCount() * 100 / GetKillTotal()) or 0 local sr = GetSecretTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetSecretCount() * 100 / GetSecretTotal()) or 0 local tr = GetTreasureTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetTreasureCount() * 100 / GetTreasureTotal()) or 0
-- Calculate time bonus (500 points per second under par) local parSec = GetParTime() local levelSec = GetLevelTime() local timeBonus = 0 if parSec > 0 and levelSec < parSec then timeBonus = math.floor((parSec - levelSec) * 500) end
SetText("BonusValue", tostring(secretBonus + timeBonus))

Menu.Name: LevelCompleteRatios
Menu.Pause: local kr = GetKillTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetKillCount() * 100 / GetKillTotal()) or 0 local sr = GetSecretTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetSecretCount() * 100 / GetSecretTotal()) or 0 local tr = GetTreasureTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetTreasureCount() * 100 / GetTreasureTotal()) or 0 if kr == 100 and sr == 100 and tr == 100 then NavigateToMenuImmediate("LevelCompletePerfect") elseif GetValue("MapOn") == 28 then -- WL_GAME.C:ex_victorious → Victory() → CharacterCast() after defeating Real Burt -- Map 28 = E6L6 (Burt the Bear). Use GetValue("MapOn") not GetEpisode()/GetFloor(): -- GetEpisode() reflects the player's original episode selection, not the current map. NavigateToMenu("Victory") else CallMenuFunction("ContinueOrShowNextMission") end
Menu.OnShow:
local floor = GetFloor() local secretLevel = IsSecretLevel() local secretBonus = secretLevel and 15000 or 0 if secretLevel then SetPicture("RatioTitleTop", "W_SECRETPIC") SetPicture("RatioTitleMiddle", "W_LEVELPIC") SetText("RatioEpisodeNumber", "") else SetPicture("RatioTitleTop", "W_LEVELPIC") SetPicture("RatioTitleMiddle", "W_FLOORPIC") SetText("RatioEpisodeNumber", tostring(GetEpisode())) end SetText("RatioFloorNumber", tostring(floor))
local kr = GetKillTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetKillCount() * 100 / GetKillTotal()) or 0 local sr = GetSecretTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetSecretCount() * 100 / GetSecretTotal()) or 0 local tr = GetTreasureTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetTreasureCount() * 100 / GetTreasureTotal()) or 0 local parSec = GetParTime() local levelSec = GetLevelTime() local timeBonus = 0 if parSec > 0 and levelSec < parSec then timeBonus = math.floor((parSec - levelSec) * 500) end local bonus = secretBonus + timeBonus if kr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end if sr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end if tr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end SetText("RatioBonusValue", tostring(bonus)) GivePoints(bonus)
QueueDelay(2) StartTicker("KillRatio", kr) StartTicker("TreasureRatio", tr) StartTicker("SecretRatio", sr)

Menu.Name: LevelCompletePerfect
Menu.Pause: -- WL_GAME.C:ex_victorious → Victory() → CharacterCast() after defeating Real Burt -- Map 28 = E6L6 (Burt the Bear). Use GetValue("MapOn") not GetEpisode()/GetFloor(): -- GetEpisode() reflects the player's original episode selection, not the current map. if GetValue("MapOn") == 28 then NavigateToMenu("Victory") else CallMenuFunction("ContinueOrShowNextMission") end
Menu.OnShow:
local floor = GetFloor() local secretLevel = IsSecretLevel() local secretBonus = secretLevel and 15000 or 0 if secretLevel then SetPicture("PerfectTitleTop", "W_SECRETPIC") SetPicture("PerfectTitleMiddle", "W_LEVELPIC") SetText("PerfectEpisodeNumber", "") else SetPicture("PerfectTitleTop", "W_LEVELPIC") SetPicture("PerfectTitleMiddle", "W_FLOORPIC") SetText("PerfectEpisodeNumber", tostring(GetEpisode())) end SetText("PerfectFloorNumber", tostring(floor))
local kr = GetKillTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetKillCount() * 100 / GetKillTotal()) or 0 local sr = GetSecretTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetSecretCount() * 100 / GetSecretTotal()) or 0 local tr = GetTreasureTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetTreasureCount() * 100 / GetTreasureTotal()) or 0 local parSec = GetParTime() local levelSec = GetLevelTime() local timeBonus = 0 if parSec > 0 and levelSec < parSec then timeBonus = math.floor((parSec - levelSec) * 500) end local bonus = secretBonus + timeBonus if kr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end if sr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end if tr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end SetText("PerfectBonusValue", tostring(bonus))

Menu.Name: Victory
Menu.OnShow: SetText("ParTimeValue", FormatTimeLong(GetTotalParTime())) SetText("TotalTimeValue", FormatTimeLong(GetTotalTime())) local kr = GetAverageKillRatio() local tr = GetAverageTreasureRatio() local sr = GetAverageSecretRatio() QueueDelay(2) StartTicker("AvgKillRatio", kr) StartTicker("AvgTreasureRatio", tr) StartTicker("AvgSecretRatio", sr)

Menu.Name: HighScores
Menu.OnShow: CheckAndAddHighScore() for i = 0, GetHighScoreCount() - 1 do SetText("Name" .. i, GetHighScoreName(i)) SetText("Level" .. i, GetHighScoreDisplayLevel(i)) SetText("Score" .. i, tostring(GetHighScoreScore(i))) end

Question.Text: Who was Noah's father?
How old was Noah when he had Shem, Ham and Japheth?
How many sons did Noah have?
What kind of wood was the Ark made of?
How many cubits long was the Ark?
How many windows did the Ark have?
How many doors did the Ark have?
How many stories did the Ark have?
How many of each kind of animal did Noah have on the Ark?
How many of each clean animal did Noah have on the Ark?
How many days did it rain?
How old was Noah when the floods came?
How many days did Noah wait in the Ark for the floods to come?
The flood waters only came from the sky.
How many people were on the Ark?
Noah collected the animals and put them in the Ark.
Who survived the flood?
How long did the flood last?
Which mountain did the Ark land on?
What was the first animal to leave the Ark?
What did the dove bring back to Noah?
How many days did Noah stay in the Ark after the dove brought the branch?
What was the first thing that Noah did after he got out of the Ark?
What is the sign that God gave us to show He would never flood the world again?
How old was Noah when he died?
Who closed the door of the Ark when the floods came?
Why did God have the floods come?
Noah was the only man to find grace in the eyes of the Lord.
How many years did God say He would strive with man?
What did Noah do after the flood?
Who was Noah's oldest son?
On which side did God tell Noah to pitch the Ark?
How wide was the Ark?
How tall was the Ark?
What did God make with Noah, so that Noah knew that he would be safe?
Besides animals, what other things did God tell Noah to have in the Ark?
Why did God choose Noah to be in the Ark?
Noah entered the Ark early to prepare for his family.
How did God make the floods go away?
How many months did Noah wait in the Ark after it came to rest on Mt. Ararat?
Who was the first man off of the Ark?
What did Noah offer to God as thanks for keeping him safe?
What did God promise never to do again?
In what book of the Bible do you find the story of Noah?
Which of Noah's ancestors lived to be 969 years old?
Noah is mentioned at least 3 times in the New Testament.
Which of Noah's descendants was called 'mighty upon the earth'?
Which of Noah's ancestors never died?
Noah is a descendent of which of Adam's sons?
Why is Noah mentioned in Hebrews 11?
Noah took his wife, sons, and daughters into the Ark.
The flood waters came from the fountains of the deep and windows of heaven.
What is a covenant?
What title is Noah given in 2 Peter 2:5?
The Gospels liken the time before the flood to the time: before:
By the time of Noah, how did God feel about having created man?
Jesus is a descendant of Noah.
What kind of creatures were NOT mentioned as destroyed in the flood?
By how much did the water cover the mountain-tops?
What day of the seventh month did the Ark come to rest on Ararat?
What was Noah commanded not to eat?
After the flood, what were the animals supposed to do?
With whom did God make His covenant?
Question.Answer: Noah, his sons and every living creature

Question.Text: Who was the father of the Canaanites?
Abraham is a descendent of which son of Noah?
Which of Noah's descendants did he curse?
Why did Shem and Japheth cover up Noah with a garment?
Question.Answer: Noah was burning from the sun

Question.Text: The rainbow is a symbol that God will never judge mankind again.
God promised that Noah and the animals would get along.
Man did not eat meat before the flood.
What did God say would happen to the man who commits murder?
Question.Answer: He will be put in jail for the rest of his life.

Question.Text: Everyone on the Ark survived the flood.
How long did it take the water to recede so that the Ark could rest on Mount Ararat?
After the flood, God destroyed the Ark.
The Bible says that Noah's wife was named Sarah.
After the flood, Noah did not have any more sons.
How many years did God give mankind to repent before the flood?
Which person lived before Noah?
Which person lived after Noah?
Noah did everything that God told him to do.
After Noah, with whom did God make His next covenant?
What kind of covenant did God make with Noah?
People did not eat vegetables before the flood.
In the covenant, God said that seedtime and harvest, cold and heat, summer and winter, and what else would not cease?
God told Noah to make windows for all of the animals.
Rainbows existed before the flood.
About how long is a cubit?
It took Noah 40 days to find two of every animal to put inside the Ark.
On what day of the month did Noah look out of the Ark and see dry land?
In Noah's curse he said Canaan would be a slave to his brethren?
How many years did Noah live after the flood?
Which of Noah's sons was a tattle-tale?
What did Noah plant after the flood?
How did God communicate to Noah?
The Ark was built with sails so God could move it.
A male and female of each animal was brought on to the Ark.
How many times did Noah send the dove out of the Ark?
How old was Lamech when he had Noah?

WallPlane.Door: if Has("Gold Key") then return true end PlayLocalSound("NOWAYSND") return false
if Has("Silver Key") then return true end PlayLocalSound("NOWAYSND") return false

StatInfo.BonusScript: SetValue("Gold Key", 1) PlaySound("D_KEYSND") FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true
SetValue("Silver Key", 1) PlaySound("D_KEYSND") FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true

-- bo_bandolier: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- gamestate.maxammo += 100 (cap 299), GiveAmmo(10), GiveGas(1), GiveMissile(1) local newmax = GetMax("Feed") + 100 if newmax > 299 then newmax = 299 end SetMax("Feed", newmax) AddValue("Feed", 10) AddValue("Gas", 1) AddValue("Missile", 1) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_25clip: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- GiveAmmo(25) if ammo < maxammo if GetValue("Feed") < GetMax("Feed") then AddValue("Feed", 25) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true end return false
if GetValue("Health") < 100 then AddValue("Health", 10) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true end return false
if GetValue("Health") < 100 then AddValue("Health", 25) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true end return false
if GetValue("Feed") < GetMax("Feed") then AddValue("Feed", 5) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true end return false

-- WL_AGENT.C:GiveTreasure #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- Counter rolls every 50; extra life on rollover. local t = GetValue("Fruit") + 1 if t >= 50 then t = t - 50 AddValue("Lives", 1) PlaySound("D_EXTRASND") else PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") end SetValue("Fruit", t) FlashScreen(0xFFFF00) return true

-- bo_alpo (SPR_QUIZ): WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- Not consumed if health >= 100 AND ammo >= maxammo. -- Full mechanic: AskQuestion(questionnum), cycling through 99 questions. if GetValue("Health") >= 100 and GetValue("Feed") >= GetMax("Feed") then return false end local questionNum = GetQuestionNum() IncrementQuestionNum() AskQuiz(questionNum) return true

-- bo_machinegun: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- gamestate.machinegun = 1; GiveWeapon(wp_machinegun=2); SD_PlaySound(GETMACHINESND=D_BONUSSND) -- GiveWeapon calls GiveAmmo(6) then switches only if bestweapon < wp_machinegun local isNew = not Has("Weapon2") SetValue("Weapon2", 1) AddValue("Feed", 6) if isNew then SwitchToWeapon("machinegun") end PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_chaingun: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- gamestate.chaingun = 1; GiveWeapon(wp_chaingun=3); SD_PlaySound(GETGATLINGSND=D_BONUSSND) -- GiveWeapon calls GiveAmmo(6) then switches only if bestweapon < wp_chaingun -- StatusDrawPic(19,4,GOTGATLINGPIC); facecount=0; gotgatgun=1 local isNew = not Has("Weapon3") SetValue("Weapon3", 1) AddValue("Feed", 6) if isNew then SwitchToWeapon("chaingun") end SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 4) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_fullheal: WL_AGENT.C (GAMEVER_WOLFREV > GV_WR_WL920312) -- SD_PlaySound(BONUS1UPSND=D_EXTRASND); HealSelf(99); GiveExtraMan(); gamestate.treasurecount++ -- Note: no GiveAmmo(25) in N3D (#ifndef GAMEVER_NOAH3D guard in source) AddValue("Health", 99) AddValue("Lives", 1) PlaySound("D_EXTRASND") return true

-- bo_flamethrower: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- SD_PlaySound(D_BONUSSND); GiveGas(20); GiveWeapon(wp_flamethrower=4) -- GiveWeapon also calls GiveAmmo(6) (Feed) then switches only if bestweapon < wp_flamethrower -- StatusDrawPic(19,4,GOTGATLINGPIC); facecount=0; gotgatgun=1 local isNew = not Has("Weapon4") AddValue("Gas", 20) AddValue("Feed", 6) SetValue("Weapon4", 1) if isNew then SwitchToWeapon("flamethrower") end SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 4) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_gascan: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- if (gamestate.gas >= 99) return; SD_PlaySound(D_BONUSSND); GiveGas(14) if GetValue("Gas") >= 99 then return false end AddValue("Gas", 14) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_launcher: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- SD_PlaySound(D_BONUSSND); GiveMissile(5); GiveWeapon(wp_missile=5) -- GiveWeapon also calls GiveAmmo(6) (Feed) then switches only if bestweapon < wp_missile -- StatusDrawPic(19,4,GOTGATLINGPIC); facecount=0; gotgatgun=1 local isNew = not Has("Weapon5") AddValue("Missile", 5) AddValue("Feed", 6) SetValue("Weapon5", 1) if isNew then SwitchToWeapon("missile") end SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 4) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_missiles: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- if (gamestate.missiles >= 99) return; SD_PlaySound(D_BONUSSND); GiveMissile(5) if GetValue("Missile") >= 99 then return false end AddValue("Missile", 5) PlaySound("D_BONUSSND") return true

-- bo_map: WL_AGENT.C #ifdef GAMEVER_NOAH3D -- SD_PlaySound(GETKEYSND=D_KEYSND); gamestate.automap = true -- RevealEntireMap marks all tiles seen so the fog system reveals them naturally. RevealEntireMap() PlaySound("D_KEYSND") return true

Actors.Function: PlaySound("D_PDIESND") if GetValue("Lives") > 0 then AddValue("Lives", -1) SetValue("Health", 100) SetValue("Feed", 7) SetValue("Gas", 0) SetValue("Missile", 0) SetValue("Gold Key", 0) SetValue("Silver Key", 0) SetValue("Weapon2", 0) SetValue("Weapon3", 0) SetValue("Weapon4", 0) SetValue("Weapon5", 0) SetValue("SelectedWeapon0", 1) SetValue("SelectedWeapon1", 1) SetValue("StatusBarWeapon", 1) return "restart" end return "HighScores"

SetMax("Health", 100) SetMax("Feed", 99) SetMax("Gas", 99) SetMax("Missile", 99) SetMax("Weapon0", 1) SetMax("Weapon1", 1) SetMax("Weapon2", 1) SetMax("Weapon3", 1) SetMax("Weapon4", 1) SetMax("Weapon5", 1)
SetValue("ExtraPoints", 40000) -- WL_DEF.H:#define EXTRAPOINTS 40000 SetValue("NextExtra", 40000) SetValue("Episode", 1) SetValue("Floor", 1) SetValue("Score", 0) SetValue("Lives", 3) SetValue("Health", 100) SetValue("Feed", 7) SetValue("Fruit", 0) SetValue("Gas", 0) SetValue("Missile", 0) SetValue("Gold Key", 0) SetValue("Silver Key", 0) SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 0) SetValue("Weapon0", 1) SetValue("Weapon1", 1) SetValue("Weapon2", 0) SetValue("Weapon3", 0) SetValue("Weapon4", 0) SetValue("Weapon5", 0) SetValue("SelectedWeapon0", 1) SetValue("SelectedWeapon1", 1) SetValue("StatusBarWeapon", 1)
SetValue("Gold Key", 0) SetValue("Silver Key", 0) SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 0)

local name, value = ... if name == "Gold Key" then SetPicture("GoldKey", value > 0 and "GOLDKEYPIC" or "NOKEYPIC") elseif name == "Silver Key" then SetPicture("SilverKey", value > 0 and "SILVERKEYPIC" or "NOKEYPIC") elseif name == "Score" then -- WL_AGENT.C:GivePoints — extra life at every ExtraPoints threshold while value >= GetValue("NextExtra") do AddValue("NextExtra", GetValue("ExtraPoints")) AddValue("Lives", 1) PlaySound("D_EXTRASND") end end

SetValue("Health", GetMax("Health")) SetValue("Feed", GetMax("Feed")) SetValue("Gas", GetMax("Gas")) SetValue("Missile", GetMax("Missile")) SetValue("Weapon0", GetMax("Weapon0")) SetValue("Weapon1", GetMax("Weapon1")) SetValue("Weapon2", GetMax("Weapon2")) SetValue("Weapon3", GetMax("Weapon3")) SetValue("Weapon4", GetMax("Weapon4")) SetValue("Weapon5", GetMax("Weapon5")) SetValue("Gold Key", 1) SetValue("Silver Key", 1) RevealEntireMap() PlaySound("D_KEYSND")

local grinTics = GetValue("FaceGrinTics") if grinTics > 0 then AddValue("FaceGrinTics", -1) SetPicture("Face", "GOTGATLINGPIC") return end local health = GetValue("Health") if health <= 0 then SetPicture("Face", "FACE8APIC") return end local level = math.min(7, math.floor((100 - health) / 16) + 1) local frames = {"A", "B", "C"} SetPicture("Face", "FACE" .. level .. frames[math.random(1, 3)] .. "PIC")

local amount = ... local difficulty = GetValue("Difficulty") if difficulty == 0 then amount = BitShiftRight(amount, 2) elseif difficulty == 1 then amount = BitShiftRight(amount, 1) elseif difficulty == 2 then amount = amount - BitShiftRight(amount, 2) end
if amount == 0 and difficulty ~= 0 then amount = 1 end
return amount

-- WL_ACT2.C:A_DeathScream - N3D plays same sound for all actor types PlayLocalSound("D_EDIESND")
-- WL_STATE.C:KillActor - per-actor score and item drop logic local actorType = GetActorType()
if actorType == "White ram" then -- guardobj AddValue("Score", 100) -- N3D: no bo_clip2 pickup handler; use bo_clip (feed) instead if GetValue("Feed") < GetMax("Feed") then PlaceItemType(45, "SPR_STAT_22") end elseif actorType == "Goat" then -- dogobj AddValue("Score", 200) -- No item drop elseif actorType == "Ostrich" then -- officerobj AddValue("Score", 400) -- N3D: no bo_clip2 pickup handler; use bo_clip (feed) instead if GetValue("Feed") < GetMax("Feed") then PlaceItemType(45, "SPR_STAT_22") end elseif actorType == "Ox" then -- mutantobj AddValue("Score", 700) -- N3D: no bo_clip2 pickup handler; use bo_clip (feed) instead if GetValue("Feed") < GetMax("Feed") then PlaceItemType(45, "SPR_STAT_22") end elseif actorType == "Antelope" then -- ssobj AddValue("Score", 500) if GetValue("Weapon2") < 1 then PlaceItemType(46, "SPR_STAT_23") -- bo_machinegun (Slingshot 2) elseif GetValue("Feed") < GetMax("Feed") then PlaceItemType(45, "SPR_STAT_22") end elseif actorType == "Carl the Camel" then -- bossobj AddValue("Score", 5000) PlaceItemType(39, "SPR_STAT_16") -- bo_key1 (yellow key) elseif actorType == "Ginny the Giraffe" then -- gretelobj AddValue("Score", 5000) PlaceItemType(39, "SPR_STAT_16") -- bo_key1 (yellow key) elseif actorType == "Melvin the Monkey" then -- schabbobj AddValue("Score", 5000) PlaceItemType(39, "SPR_STAT_16") -- bo_key1 (yellow key) elseif actorType == "Kerry the Kangaroo" then -- giftobj AddValue("Score", 5000) PlaceItemType(39, "SPR_STAT_16") -- bo_key1 (yellow key) elseif actorType == "Ernie the Elephant" then -- fatobj AddValue("Score", 5000) PlaceItemType(39, "SPR_STAT_16") -- bo_key1 (yellow key) elseif actorType == "Burt the Bear" then -- mechahitlerobj AddValue("Score", 5000) -- No item drop elseif actorType == "Hitler" then -- realhitlerobj AddValue("Score", 5000) -- No item drop end
PlayLocalSound("D_GOATSND")
PlayLocalSound("D_OSTRCHSND")
PlayLocalSound("D_OXSND")
PlayLocalSound("D_ANTLPESND")
PlaySound("D_CAMELSND")
PlaySound("D_GIRAFESND")
PlaySound("D_MONKEYSND")
PlaySound("D_KANGROSND")
PlaySound("D_ELPHNTSND")
PlaySound("D_BEARSND")
-- No-op. Active projectile movement/collision is simulated in C#.

-- WL_ACT2.C:T_Shoot (lines 4150-4218) -- Attempt to shoot the player based on line of sight and distance
if not CheckLine() then return end
local dx = GetPlayerTileX() - GetTileX() local dy = GetPlayerTileY() - GetTileY() if dx < 0 then dx = -dx end if dy < 0 then dy = -dy end local dist = dx if dy > dx then dist = dy end
local actorType = GetActorType() if actorType == "Antelope" or actorType == "Carl the Camel" then dist = (dist * 2) / 3 end
-- VR intentionally always uses the "running player" formula (160 base) so -- teleport locomotion does not leave nausea-sensitive players unfairly easier -- to hit than players who can continuously strafe. local hitchance = 160 - (dist * 16)
if US_RndT() < hitchance then local damage = 0 if dist < 2 then damage = US_RndT() / 4 elseif dist < 4 then damage = US_RndT() / 8 else damage = US_RndT() / 16 end
DamagePlayer(damage) end
local shootSound if actorType == "Antelope" then shootSound = ResolveSound("SSFIRESND", "D_SPITSND") elseif actorType == "Carl the Camel" or actorType == "Burt the Bear" then shootSound = ResolveSound("BOSSFIRESND", "D_SPITSND") elseif actorType == "Kerry the Kangaroo" or actorType == "Ernie the Elephant" then shootSound = ResolveSound("SCHABBSTHROWSND", "D_COCTHRSND") else shootSound = ResolveSound("NAZIFIRESND", "D_SPITSND") end PlayLocalSound(shootSound)

-- WL_ACT2.C:T_UShoot - Ubermutant uses the normal boss hitscan plus point-blank impact damage.
if CheckLine() then local dx = GetPlayerTileX() - GetTileX() local dy = GetPlayerTileY() - GetTileY() if dx < 0 then dx = -dx end if dy < 0 then dy = -dy end local dist = dx if dy > dx then dist = dy end
-- VR intentionally always uses the "running player" formula (160 base) so -- teleport locomotion does not leave nausea-sensitive players unfairly easier -- to hit than players who can continuously strafe. local hitchance = 160 - (dist * 16) if US_RndT() < hitchance then local damage = 0 if dist < 2 then damage = US_RndT() / 4 elseif dist < 4 then damage = US_RndT() / 8 else damage = US_RndT() / 16 end
DamagePlayer(damage) end end
-- No Ubermutant equivalent in N3D; BOSSFIRESND falls back to D_SPITSND PlayLocalSound(ResolveSound("BOSSFIRESND", "D_SPITSND"))
if CalculateDistanceToPlayer() <= 1 then DamagePlayer(10) end
PlaySound("D_KNIFESND") RequestMelee({ range = 1.5, arc = 60, damageBase = 0, damageRandom = 16 })
if GetValue("Gas") < 1 then return end PlaySound("D_COCTHRSND") AddValue("Gas", -1) RequestProjectile("cantaloupe") PropagateNoise()
if GetValue("Gas") < 1 then SwitchToLowestWeapon() end
if GetValue("Missile") < 1 then return end PlaySound("D_WATTHRSND") AddValue("Missile", -1) RequestProjectile("watermelon") PropagateNoise()
if GetValue("Missile") < 1 then SwitchToLowestWeapon() end
